title: Surgeon Vacancy at Bombay Hospital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Bombay Hospital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Bombay Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Bombay Hospital:
Bombay Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Hospital!
